title: Platform rule for disclosure and participation
prompt: A platform chooses whether sellers must disclose a quality signal. Sellers then decide whether to participate, and buyers update beliefs from disclosed information and participation. Describe the digital-rule design problem while preserving the sequence of moves and strategic responses.

model_specification.mechanism: The disclosure rule changes seller participation incentives and the information buyers infer.

fidelity_requirements: Platform moves before sellers and buyers
Buyer beliefs respond to equilibrium behavior
prohibited_inferences: The platform observes seller quality when setting the rule
